calendar.matters:
Motion For Order Compelling Respondent To Comply With Administrative Subpoena
Off Calendar May-25-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ALEC L. SEGARICH, Esq. of Department of Industrial Relations - Division of Labor Standards Enforcement (Tel: 415-703-4863) for petitioner Lila Garcia-Brower, Labor Commissioner, State of California;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER LILIA GARCIA-BROWER, LABOR COMMISIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order Compelling Respondent To Comply With Administrative Subpoena.

Petitioner stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for petitioner authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

See ruling as to Order to Show Cause.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Order To Show Cause Re Enforcement Of Administrative Subpoena (Set Per Ex Parte Order Filed On 2/18/22)
Off Calendar May-25-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ALEC L. SEGARICH, Esq. of Department of Industrial Relations - Division of Labor Standards Enforcement (Tel: 415-703-4863) for petitioner Lila Garcia-Brower, Labor Commissioner, State of California;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Order To Show Cause Re Enforcement Of Administrative Subpoena (Set Per Ex Parte Order Filed On 2/18/22).

Petitioner stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for petitioner authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED TO PLAINTIFF LABOR COMMISSIONER FOR THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER COMPELLING RESPONDENTS LUGG, INC AND JORDAN BROWNS TO COMPLY WITH THE ADMINISTRATIVE SUBPOENA REQUIRING THE PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS SPECIFIED IN THE SUBPOENA. ACCORDINGLY THE COURT WILL GRANT THE MOTION AND SIGN THE ORDER SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF WITH THE MOTION.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Order To Show Cause Re Enforcement Of Administrative Subpoena (Set Per Ex Parte Order Filed On 2/18/22)
Off Calendar May-04-2022 Continued To May-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

Motion For Order Compelling Respondent To Comply With Administrative Subpoena
